$schema_doc: Findings listed here are intentionally accepted. Each entry must include a justification. Format: {name, detail, reason}. The CI script matches on `${name}::${detail}` exactly.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.has_role\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Required by RLS policies; only returns a boolean about the caller's own role.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.has_any_role\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Required by RLS policies for multi-role checks.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.has_permission\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Powers granular permission RLS policies; only returns a boolean about the caller's own permission.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.get_my_role_permissions\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Returns ONLY the caller's own permissions; used by the usePermissions hook to render UI.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.regenerate_webhook_secret\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Admin-gated internally via has_role(..., 'admin'); raises 'Access denied' for non-admins.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.verify_webhook_secret\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Admin-gated internally via has_role(..., 'admin'); raises 'Access denied' for non-admins.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.log_security_doc_view\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Admin-gated internally via has_role(..., 'admin'); writes a single audit_logs row when admins open the Security admin page. Raises 'Access denied' for non-admins.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.log_moderation_action\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Admin/moderator-gated internally via has_any_role(..., ['admin','moderator']); writes a single audit_logs row when staff hide, delete, or update community content. Raises 'Access denied' for non-staff.

allowed.name: auth_security_definer_function
allowed.detail: Function \`public.log_security_step_up\` is a SECURITY DEFINER function callable by signed-in users ("authenticated" role).
allowed.reason: Admin-gated internally via has_role(..., 'admin'); writes a single audit_logs row when an admin completes the step-up password confirmation. Raises 'Access denied' for non-admins.
